question_template: After the hypothetical motion, would object '{object_id}' be on the observer's left or right?
answer_rule: Apply egomotion; compute signed bearing; map negative/positive angle to left/right according to your coordinate convention.
quality_checks: ground truth must be generated from simulator state / geometry / navigation / rendering, not from LLM
avoid boundary cases where two options are nearly tied
notes: Reference template only. Adapt field names to your generator.
